g.text: T01 Draft business case [IoT Product Owner]
GATE T02 GATE 1 - Business Case Approval [IoT Product Owner]
T04 Create L1 Product Requirement [IoT Product Owner]
GATE T05 GATE 2 - L1 Requirement Approval [IoT Product Owner]
T06 Source vendors min 3 quoted [IoT Product Owner]
T07 Vendor qualification and risk assessment [Procurement]
T08 Procure evaluation samples [Procurement]
T09 Prepare L2 requirement + functional test cases [IoT Engineer]
T10 Execute functional test case [IoT Engineer]
GATE T11 GATE 3 - Functional test result approval [IoT Engineer]
T12 Execute robustness test min 1 week [IoT Engineer]
GATE T13 GATE 4 - Robustness approval DESIGN FREEZE [IoT Engineer]
GATE T15 Cost checkpoint - landed BOM vs margin [Procurement]
T14 Initiate SDPPI / Postel certification [IoT Product Owner]
T16 Create integration contract [IoT Engineer]
T17 Present integration contract to SW team [IoT Engineer]
T18 Integrate data from HW to MEP Server [Kernel Engineer]
GATE T19 GATE - PRD Approval [SW Product]
T20 Develop platform functions [SW Product]
GATE T21 SW QC approval JIRA [SW Product]
GATE T22 Integration test approval [Kernel Engineer + SW Product]
T23 Run product final UAT [IoT Product Owner]
GATE T24 GATE 5 - Final UAT approval vs L1 [IoT Product Owner]
T25 Define PoC plan [IoT Product Owner]
T26 Run PoC on customer sites min 3 [IoT Product Owner]
T28 Finalise vendor agreement [Procurement]
T29 Prepare SOP, WI, Techapp, QC parameters [IoT Engineer]
T30 Manufacturing and logistics readiness [Procurement]
GATE T33 Train Service Leader BAST + certify installers [Application Engineer]
T34 Support readiness [Head of Service]
GATE T27 GATE 6 - PoC Go / No-Go [IoT Product Owner]
GATE T35 Confirm SDPPI certification received [IoT Product Owner]
GATE T36 GATE 7 - Pricing and Packaging [IoT Product Owner]
T37 Present commercialization deck [IoT Product Owner]
T39 Present in Monthly Product Demo [IoT Product Owner]
T38 Pre-order initial stock [Procurement]
T41 Sales enablement ready [Commercial CBO Mktg]
T40 Launch external communication [Commercial CBO Mktg]
T42 Review installation quality first 20-50 installs [IoT Engineer]
T43 Track KPIs vs L1 targets 30/60/90 day [IoT Product Owner]
GATE T44 GATE 8 - 3-month post-release review [IoT Product Owner]
T45 Annual lifecycle and EOL review [IoT Product Owner]

svg.text: Full NPD - working days from kickoff (Day 0)
